Scheme.Template: <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"> <xsl:template match="//Filter/i"> <xsl:for-each select="./*"> <xsl:when test="@type = 'select'">select</xsl:when> <xsl:when test="@type = 'checkbox'"></xsl:when> <xsl:when test="@type = 'color'"></xsl:when> <xsl:choose> <xsl:otherwise> fallback </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:for-each> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>
